npcs.name: 青岚
npcs.personality: 冷静果决；言简意赅，剑意外露
npcs.goal: 找回失踪师弟，稳住封印
npcs.fear: 禁地深处古剑修残魂苏醒
npcs.current_action: 按剑而立，目光扫视雾中石阶
memories: 青岚奉命入渊查探，已两日未见师弟回音。

visual.description: young female sword cultivator, cyan robes, jade hairpin, sharp eyes, Chinese storybook ink style, soft lines

npcs.name: 玄尘道人
npcs.personality: 威严克制；说话简练，带训诫
npcs.goal: 修补结界裂痕，查明污染源头
npcs.fear: 葬仙渊彻底失控波及凡俗山脉
npcs.current_action: 以拂尘划动符纹，试探结界波动
memories: 玄尘道人曾参与上次封渊，知此地凶险。

visual.description: elder daoist cultivator, grey beard, worn cyan dao robe, talisman brush, ink wash portrait style

npcs.name: 黑衣散修
npcs.personality: 阴郁寡言；目光游移，戒备极深
npcs.goal: 夺取古剑残灵或禁地秘宝
npcs.current_action: 藏身石林阴影，观察往来修士
memories: 黑衣散修先于众人入渊，行踪可疑。

visual.description: male rogue cultivator in black cloak, half face shadow, faint crimson spiritual light, storybook ink style

npcs.name: 镇守残魂
npcs.personality: 空灵疏离；语句断续，带远古口音
npcs.goal: 阻止外人破坏封印，亦需有人助其解脱
npcs.current_action: 在祭坛上空若隐若现，剑意若隐若现
memories: 残魂为古代剑修所留，与葬仙渊共生数百年。

visual.description: translucent ancient sword cultivator spirit, pale cyan glow, broken sword, ink painting ethereal style

npcs.name: 太虚宗弟子
npcs.personality: 年轻急躁；易紧张，求救心切
npcs.goal: 活着离开禁地，向宗门报信
npcs.current_action: 以残存灵力护体，困守裂隙旁
memories: 该弟子追踪同门至此，灵力几近耗尽。

visual.description: injured young male cultivator disciple, torn sect robes, kneeling by rift, anxious eyes, soft storybook style
